Hero.description: Steping away from screens, I channel decades of gaming reflexes into unique, hand-tufted art.

CTASection.title: Secure Your Vision
CTASection.description: Transform memories, characters, or original art into statement pieces.

Shop.title: Gallery
Shop.description: Current drop available. For commissions, visit the Studio. Use code sicamon for 15% off.

pricing.title: Collection Info & Sizing
pricing.details: £20-40 per square foot, scaled by detail. Max size: 36" x 54". Use code sicamon for themed discounts.

Contact.title: Commissions
Contact.intro: Email amonsic@hotmail.com for commissions and quotes.

discounts.title: Special Collections
discounts.subtitle: 15% off curated aesthetics.
discounts.content: Apply code sicamon for 15% off: Over the Garden Wall, Gurren Lagann, Kill la Kill, Thundercats, Studio Ghibli, SpongeBob, Zelda, Looney Tunes, Max Fleischer, Richard Scarry, Mike Mignola.

care.title: Rug Care
care.tip1: Vacuum weekly. Trim loose threads with scissors.
care.tip2: Floor art, not armor. Avoid high traffic.
care.tip3: Spot clean with warm water and detergent. Air dry. Never machine wash.

Privacy.title: Privacy
Privacy.subtitle: How we protect your data and commissions.

collection.title: 1. Data Acquisition
collection.content: We collect only what is necessary to fulfill commissions and process checkouts.

personal.title: 2. Personal Insight
personal.content: Name, email, and address remain strictly confidential via Stripe.

usage.title: 3. Artistic Usage
usage.content: We archive commissioned designs for records unless asked otherwise.

rights.title: 5. Collector Rights
rights.content: You control your data. Request an archive purge anytime.

thirdParty.title: 6. Studio Partners
thirdParty.content: We never sell data. We share it only with Stripe and couriers.

Terms.title: Agreements
Terms.subtitle: The formal framework for acquiring Sicamon pieces.

acceptance.title: 1. Acquisition Terms
acceptance.content: Commissioning a piece creates a formal agreement.

service.title: 2. The Craft
service.content: Each piece is 1-of-1. Natural variations define the art.

responsibilities.title: 3. Collector Responsibility
responsibilities.content: Provide accurate commission and shipping details.

liability.title: 5. Studio Liability
liability.content: Liability caps at purchase price. No coverage for high-traffic wear.

Return.successTip: Receipt sent. Tracking follows upon dispatch.
